name: QA 1558
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1558

compatibility testing for libpcp.so.3 and PMAPI_VERSION_2 and

PMAPI_VERSION_4



Copyright (c) 2025 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py fedora41-container reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 1558

compatibility testing for libpcp.so.3 and PMAPI_VERSION_2 and

PMAPI_VERSION_4

Copyright (c) 2025 Ken McDonell. All Rights Reserved.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py fedora41-container reproduce

testStage.description:
PCP QA Test No. 1558

compatibility testing for libpcp.so.3 and PMAPI_VERSION_2 and

PMAPI_VERSION_4



Copyright (c) 2025 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py fedora41-container reproduce
